notes:
I played Emergency 2016 but I can not choose it here anymore...but I think there are no big changes between 2016 and 20 in case of compatibility.
Game runs out of the Box but to change grafic settings you need to start with  "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%" after then you can remove the command again.
title: EMERGENCY 20

notes: Cannot change graphics settings with PROTON_NO_D3D11, but with PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE it works. Game runs fine, but crashes here and there.
title: EMERGENCY 20
